title: Known issues
excerpt: description: Current bugs and limitations for Cloudflare Pages builds, deployments, and configuration. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Here are some known bugs and issues with Cloudflare Pages: * GitHub and GitLab are currently the only supported platforms for automatic CI/CD builds. [Direct Upload](https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/get-started/direct-upload/) allows you to integrate your own build platform or upload from your local computer.
